writeup: The Buffalo Bills made a significant offseason announcement on June 16, 2026, releasing their 2026 Training Camp schedule, which includes seven open practices at St. John Fisher University — though notably fewer than in previous years. Excitement around the new Highmark Stadium continued to build as the first bison statue was installed outside the venue, giving fans a tangible preview of the new game-day experience. On the contract front, the future deal for right guard O'Cyrus Torrence is drawing attention, with Joe Tippman's recent extension setting a market benchmark that will directly influence negotiations. Meanwhile, Josh Allen expressed confidence in the team's spring progress, and a retrospective piece reminded fans that amid ongoing Super Bowl window conversations, the Bills have already secured championships worth celebrating.
